subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-06-12 in Tiberias
subcodes.first_line: Man must be qualified with the attributes of the Kingdom. Man must characterize himself with the characteristics of the Kingdom.
subcodes.subjects: @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @the golden rule; regard for one's neighbor; doing unto others, @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline
